_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of current industry methods for evaluating, implementing, and disseminating information technology (IT) security assessment, monitoring, detection, and remediation tools and procedures utilizing standards-based concepts and capabilities.
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain AI security standards for the enterprise, including training data provenance requirements, model registry controls, and LLM application security requirements.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-A-005 (RC, cosine: 0.557), SP-S-003 (SP, cosine: 0.545).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.481). Shared vocabulary: [security, standards]. DCWF-only terms [assessment, based, capabilities, concepts, current, detection] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, application, controls, data, develop, enterprise] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.857 (P=0.853, R=0.861). Balanced P/R — the 27-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Knowledge of current industry methods for evaluating, implementing, and dissemin" and "Develop and maintain AI security standards for the enterprise, including trainin" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.594 > STS 0.481 (gap +0.114). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [security, standards] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.0%. Shared tokens: [security, standards]. DCWF-only: [assessment, based, capabilities, concepts, current, detection]. WIDAI-only: [ai, application, controls, data, develop, enterprise].

signals.detail: STS 0.481 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
